APP & ORD RE; DISPOSAL OFE EXHIBITS FILED
SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED

/X:COURT HAS REVIEWED APD REPORT, PEOPLE'S SENTENCING MEMORANDUM, DEFENDANT'S SENTENCING MEMORANDUM,/X:STATEMENTS BY COUNSEL,/MO:TO STRIKE TWO 1 YEARPRIORS PURSUANT TO 667,5(B) GRANTED/AJW/CH1:SP 3 Y:U/CTSP:131/STATES/ENH:CH1:TYPE PC667(D)& 667(E):TI 3 Y:CS/TEXT:TOTAL 6 YEARS STATE PRISON/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/APPEAL/TEXT/5A/5B/
/X:BY STIPULATION OF COUNSEL AND CONCURRENCE OF DEFENDANT, COURT TRIAL IS RESET FOR MAY 7, 2002,/

/X:10:31 AM: DEFENDANT REFUSES TO PARTICIPATE IN PROCEEDINGS; COURT ADVISESDEFENDANT THAT THE COURT TRIAL WILL PROCEED WITH THE DOOR TO THE HOLDING CELL OPEN AND THE DEFENDANT REMAINING IN THE HOLDING CELL,/X:10:37 AM: DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURTROOM; DEFENDANT ADVISED BY THE COURTOF MAKING STATEMENTS WITHOUT CONFERRING WITH COUNSEL,/X:DEFENDANT MAKES MARSDEN MOTION; MARSDEN HEARING HELD,/X:MARSDEN MOTION DENIED,/CONTD:COURT TRIAL/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE OPENING STATEMENTS - ARGUMENTS/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF PROSECUTION EXHIBITS-WITNESSES/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE CLOSING ARGUMENTS/

/CAL:MARSDEN MOTION/MO:DENIED//X:PRETRIAL DISCUSSIONS OFF THE RECORD (ATTORNEY KHINE PRESENT),//X:COUNSEL AND DEFENDANT PRESENT; SETTLEMENT OFFER REMAINS OPEN TO APRIL 8,2002,//X:COURT RULES THAT PRIORS ARE BIFURCATED; WITNESSES ARE EXCLUDED; AND THATNO REFERENCE SHALL BE MADE TO THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE,/X:COURT FURTHERRULES THAT IF THE DEFENDANT TESTIFIES, 788 EVIDENCE CODE APPLIES,/
/X:TRANSFERRED TO DEPT 22 FOR DEFENDANT'S TIME WAIVER,//TEXT:CAUSE IS ORDERED RETURNED TO DEPT 22/RET22/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
